name: Heath Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream butter well with an electric mixer.
3. Blend in brown sugar, egg yolk, and vanilla extract.
4. Mix in flour, 1 1/2 bags Heath Bits, and nuts by hand.
5. Press mixture into an ungreased 15 1/2 x 10 1/2 inch jelly roll pan.
6. Bake for 18 to 20 minutes, or until browned.
7. Remove from oven and sprinkle remaining 1/2 bag Heath Bits over top.
8. Cool slightly; cut into bars while warm.
